metadata.title: Daily Routines Basics
metadata.source_description: Supplemental A1 vocab selected from coverage gaps

item.notes: Coverage gap: daily-routines. Basic movement verb useful for exercise and commuting routines.
item.image_prompt: A polished, engaging illustration of a Korean adult walking along a clean neighborhood street in Korea, everyday city scenery, realistic friendly style, no text.

image.prompt: A polished, engaging illustration of a Korean adult walking along a clean neighborhood street in Korea, everyday city scenery, realistic friendly style, no text. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.

cards.back_html:
walk
걷다
geotda

Examples

  • 저는 매일 걸어요.
    I walk every day.
Coverage gap: daily-routines. Basic movement verb useful for exercise and commuting routines.
Source: New vocab proposal • coverage-gap • daily-routines

걷다
walk
geotda

Examples

  • 저는 매일 걸어요.
    I walk every day.
Coverage gap: daily-routines. Basic movement verb useful for exercise and commuting routines.
Source: New vocab proposal • coverage-gap • daily-routines

item.notes: Coverage gap: daily-routines. Very common everyday noun used with leaving home and dressing routines.
item.image_prompt: A polished, engaging illustration of a pair of clean shoes at the entryway of a contemporary Korean apartment, tidy and realistic composition, no text.

image.prompt: A polished, engaging illustration of a pair of clean shoes at the entryway of a contemporary Korean apartment, tidy and realistic composition, no text. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.
